commands.author: saju01

target.title: fix(github-copilot): prefer live model catalog
target.body:
## Summary

- remove the bundled/static GitHub Copilot model catalog rows from the plugin manifest
- remove stale static Copilot metadata overrides and the now-dead defaults helper
- keep Copilot model catalog visibility sourced from the live `/models` provider hook, with explicit user config as the fallback/override path
- add regression coverage that the plugin no longer publishes bundled Copilot rows and uses live `/models` metadata such as GPT-5.5's context window
- update the provider-policy artifact so it no longer imports the removed static metadata override helper

Fixes #88548.

## Tests

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/index.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/provider-policy-api.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/github-copilot`

## Real behavior proof

Ran the patched `extensions/github-copilot` token + catalog modules directly from this PR branch against a real Copilot-enabled OpenClaw developer setup. Token values are not printed; model rows below are from the live `/models` response via the patched `fetchCopilotModelCatalog` path.

```json
{
  "proof": "patched github-copilot fetchCopilotModelCatalog live /models",
  "baseUrl": "https://api.enterprise.githubcopilot.com",
  "modelCount": 36,
  "selected": [
    {
      "id": "claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal",
      "name": "Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)(Internal only)",
      "api": "anthropic-messages",
      "reasoning": true,
      "contextWindow": 1000000,
      "maxTokens": 64000,
      "input": ["text", "image"],
      "compat": {
        "supportedReasoningEfforts": ["low", "medium", "high", "xhigh", "max"]
      },
      "thinkingLevelMap": { "xhigh": "xhigh" }
    },
    {
      "id": "gpt-5.3-codex",
      "name": "GPT-5.3-Codex",
      "api": "openai-responses",
      "reasoning": true,
      "contextWindow": 400000,
      "maxTokens": 128000,
      "input": ["text", "image"],
      "compat": {
        "supportedReasoningEfforts": ["low", "medium", "high", "xhigh"]
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "gpt-5.4",
      "name": "GPT-5.4",
      "api": "openai-responses",
      "reasoning": true,
      "contextWindow": 1050000,
      "maxTokens": 128000,
      "input": ["text", "image"],
      "compat": {
        "supportedReasoningEfforts": ["none", "low", "medium", "high", "xhigh"]
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "gpt-5.5",
      "name": "GPT-5.5",
      "api": "openai-responses",
      "reasoning": true,
      "contextWindow": 1050000,
      "maxTokens": 128000,
      "input": ["text", "image"],
      "compat": {
        "supportedReasoningEfforts": ["none", "low", "medium", "high", "xhigh"]
      }
    }
  ],
  "firstFiveIds": [
    "claude-opus-4.6-1m",
    "claude-opus-4.6",
    "claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal",
    "claude-opus-4.7-high",
    "claude-opus-4.7-xhigh"
  ]
}
```

Maintainer compatibility note: if Copilot live discovery is disabled or token exchange/live `/models` discovery fails, this PR intentionally no longer exposes stale bundled Copilot manifest rows. Explicit user-configured Copilot models remain the fallback/override path.
